email_subject: Application for Junior Digital Inhouse Marketing - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Yannick,

I am writing to apply for the Junior Digital Inhouse Marketing position at Krachtig Online. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and web development, I am eager to bring my skills to your team and grow through your intensive training program.

Currently, I work as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, where I handle on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress site management. I also run my own project, mirook.com, where I have implemented structured data and GEO strategies to improve visibility in AI-powered search. I am comfortable with content creation, social media, and analytics tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush.

I am highly motivated to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment. Your 4-month training program and focus on practical skills align perfectly with my career goals. I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and have a valid driver's license (B) for travel to client sites in Kempen and Limburg.

I have attached my CV, cover letter, and portfolio. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Yannick,

I am excited to apply for the Junior Digital Inhouse Marketing position at Krachtig Online. As a junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in SEO, content creation, and web development, I am confident that I can contribute to your team and thrive in your intensive training environment.

In my current role at Episto, I manage on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, and write targeted blog content to drive organic traffic. I also build and maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra, ensuring they are optimized for performance and user experience. Additionally, I track site performance using SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Google Search Console, which has given me a solid foundation in data-driven decision-making.

My personal project, mirook.com, has been a valuable learning experience in GEO and AEO. I implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema), entity optimization, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines. This project reflects my proactive approach to learning and my ability to apply new techniques independently.

I am drawn to Krachtig Online because of your commitment to training and growth. The 4-month onboarding program, combined with the opportunity to work on diverse client projects, is exactly what I am looking for to build a career in online marketing. I am eager to learn from your experienced team and contribute my skills in content, graphics, and advertising.

I hold a valid driver's license (B) and am willing to travel to client sites in Kempen and Limburg. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can add value to Krachtig Online.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on SEO and content marketing experience: on-page SEO, keyword research, blog writing, and performance tracking with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console.
- WordPress site building and maintenance using Elementor and Astra, including content uploads and page updates.
- Project mirook.com: implemented structured data (JSON-LD), entity optimization, and GEO/AEO strategies to improve AI search visibility.
- Social media content and integration experience (Instagram, Facebook) for client projects.
- Valid driver's license (B) and willingness to travel to client sites in Kempen and Limburg.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in SEO, content marketing, and web development. Currently managing on-page SEO and keyword-targeted content for client websites at Episto, and running a personal project (mirook.com) focused on GEO and structured data optimization. Skilled in WordPress, analytics tools, and social media integration. Eager to grow into a full-fledged marketeer through an intensive training program. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
